title: Usage Analytics
noProfiles: No profiles yet. Create one to get started.
connectedDescription: Already installed for the current CLI.
notConnectedDescription: Available to connect, but not installed for the current CLI yet.
unassignedDescription: Not connected to any CLI yet.
currentCliListDescription: Manage skills in the current CLI context.
currentCliDiscoveredFallback: No imported skills yet — showing discovered skills for each CLI.
currentCliDiscoveredDescription: Found on the selected CLI but not imported into your library yet.
importToManageHere: Import or resolve them above to manage them here.
currentCliSettingsDescription: Configure how this skill syncs to the selected CLI.
skillSearchPlaceholder: Search skills by name, description, or path...
emptyGroupState: No skills in this group yet.
skillsWorkspaceDescription: Import once, search quickly, then decide which CLIs should receive each skill without bouncing between multiple panels.
allCaughtUp: No conflicts or pending surprises right now.
reviewConflictsFirst: Resolve or review these items before syncing more changes.
skillsConflictDescription: Choose whether the tool copy or the library copy should win, then keep everything aligned from this page.
skillsSearchDescription: Try another keyword, switch the CLI view, or clear the filters to see more skills.
skillsFilterEmptyDescription: Change the filter, switch the CLI view, or create a new skill to keep going.
basicInfoDescription: Keep the name friendly, point the source path to the real skill folder, and add just enough description so it stays searchable.
sourcePathHint: Point to the original skill folder, then choose which CLIs should receive it after you save.
skillNameHint: If the name is empty while you type a path, the folder name is suggested automatically.
syncToClisDescription: Choose which CLIs should receive this skill. The highlighted card matches the CLI view on the left.
noSelection: Select a skill to start editing.
noSelectionDescription: Pick a skill from the left or create a new one. You'll be able to edit the source path, description, and CLI connections here.
noImportedSkillsDescription: Import discovered skills above or create one manually to start managing them here.
nothingReadyToImport: Nothing is ready to import yet.
nothingReadyToImportDescription: When a CLI already contains safe, non-conflicting skills, they will appear here.
saveDraftFirst: Save or reset this draft before using quick actions.
onboardingImportDescription: If your CLI already has skills, bring them into the global library first. After that, you can search, edit, and sync everything from one place.
onboardingCreateDescription: If nothing can be imported yet, create a library entry manually. Add the source folder once, then decide which CLIs should receive it.
noSessions: No sessions found in this period.
skillsLoadFailed: Failed to load the latest skills overview.
skillsOverviewDescription: See the global library first, then check what each CLI is really using, and only then edit or open a specific skill directory.
skillsCliTooltipTitle: What does the Skills CLI do?
skillsCliTooltipBody: It installs skills into AI agent and CLI environments. You can use it to install this project's agent-usage skill, then query usage, costs, and sessions directly inside conversations.
skillsCliTooltipHint: Typical flow: run the command above to install, then try “check agent usage” or “agent usage stats”.
skillsMetricLibraryHelp: Skills already under the global library and central control.
skillsMetricConnectedHelp: Per-CLI installs currently bound to a managed version.
skillsMetricIssuesHelp: CLI installs that are unmanaged, missing, or no longer aligned with the selected version.
skillsMetricUnmanagedHelp: Skills that exist on disk but are not yet centrally managed.
skillsPrimaryListDescription: The list is deduplicated by logical skill name so you can compare the library and every CLI in one place.
skillsCreateDescription: If a skill is not discoverable yet, register its real source folder here and let the library manage it from now on.
skillsSearchPlaceholderNew: Search by skill name, description, or path...
skillsEmptyDescription: Try another search, switch the filter, or refresh the inventory after changing your local skill folders.
skillsLibraryMissingHint: Import it into the library before managing CLI usage here.
skillsDetailEmpty: Select a row to inspect versions, switch what each CLI uses, and open the relevant folders.
skillsEditDescription: Edit the shared name, description, and primary library path. CLI version choices are managed below per tool.
skillsToolDescription: Each CLI can point to a different managed version. Switching here immediately re-syncs the real installation.
skillsIssuesDescription: These are the remaining mismatches between the selected managed version and what each CLI currently has on disk.
skillsActionFailed: Failed to update the selected skill state.
skillsCreateFailed: Failed to create the managed skill.
skillsOpenFailed: Failed to open the requested path.
skillsVariantApplied: CLI now uses the selected version.
